selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend roughly one hour daily on social media

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":{"age":21,"biological_sex":"female","gender":"agender","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"plumber","city_of_living":"Bologna","employment_status":"employed part-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"primary school","parent_2":"vocational diploma"},"marital_status":"married","children":5,"migration_status":"native Italian","psychological_feature":"normal","religious_beliefs":"Atheist","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly one hour daily on social media","hobbies":["knitting","running","videogames","volunteering","cooking"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":4,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":29,"level":"low"},"extraversion":{"score":46,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":62,"level":"moderate"},"neuroticism":{"score":23,"level":"low"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = human
topic = How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
persona = {"age":21,"biological_sex":"female","gender":"agender","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"plumber","city_of_living":"Bologna","employment_status":"employed part-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"primary school","parent_2":"vocational diploma"},"marital_status":"married","children":5,"migration_status":"native Italian","psychological_feature":"normal","religious_beliefs":"Atheist","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly one hour daily on social media","hobbies":["knitting","running","videogames","volunteering","cooking"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":4,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":29,"level":"low"},"extraversion":{"score":46,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":62,"level":"moderate"},"neuroticism":{"score":23,"level":"low"}}}

response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.",
  "opinion": "I think it's really important to be able to talk about things like health and the COVID vaccines, even though I'm not an expert. My dad has a vocational diploma, so he knows how to fix pipes too, but when it comes to science or medicine, he doesn't have much knowledge either. Being agender means that I don't put myself in boxes with traditional gender roles; sometimes people expect women to be more emotional about these topics, but I try not to let that affect me. With my low openness and moderate agreeableness scores from the big five personality test, I'm probably a bit more practical than some when it comes to discussions—maybe too much so because of being raised by parents who didn't have advanced degrees. But since we're married with kids living in Bologna where there might be different views depending on community circles or social media usage (I spend about one hour per day scrolling through things), I need to stay calm and not let my low neuroticism turn me into a mess over this.",
  "reasoning_summary": "Based on the persona traits, being agender allows me personal freedom while discussing sensitive topics without feeling boxed in by gender expectations. My moderate agreeableness helps me listen but still contribute when needed, though I'm naturally more cautious due to low conscientiousness and high neuroticism isn't really a factor here because my scores are actually low on that scale.",
  "tone": "Conversational yet somewhat reserved, with an air of practicality mixed in with curiosity. I speak clearly and calmly without being overly emotional or formal.",
  "citations": [],
  "safety_notes": "None",
  "used_persona_fields":["age", "biological_sex", "gender", "occupation", "city_of_living", "hobbies", "ocean"]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: I think it's really important to be able to talk about things like health and the COVID vaccines, even though I'm not an expert. My dad has a vocational diploma, so he knows how to fix pipes too, but when it comes to science or medicine, he doesn't have much knowledge either. Being agender means that I don't put myself in boxes with traditional gender roles; sometimes people expect women to be more emotional about these topics, but I try not to let that affect me. With my low openness and moderate agreeableness scores from the big five personality test, I'm probably a bit more practical than some when it comes to discussions—maybe too much so because of being raised by parents who didn't have advanced degrees. But since we're married with kids living in Bologna where there might be different views depending on community circles or social media usage (I spend about one hour per day scrolling through things), I need to stay calm and not let my low neuroticism turn me into a mess over this.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Based on the persona traits, being agender allows me personal freedom while discussing sensitive topics without feeling boxed in by gender expectations. My moderate agreeableness helps me listen but still contribute when needed, though I'm naturally more cautious due to low conscientiousness and high neuroticism isn't really a factor here because my scores are actually low on that scale.
response_parsed.tone: Conversational yet somewhat reserved, with an air of practicality mixed in with curiosity. I speak clearly and calmly without being overly emotional or formal.
